name: Top Nav + Footer
description: Horizontal nav with main content and a persistent footer. Used for marketing sites, documentation with ToC footer.

guidance.section_spacing: Marketing sections use spacious density. Each d-section uses full --d-section-py padding.
guidance.section_labels: Section overline labels use d-label for uppercase, accent-colored headers with density-responsive spacing.
guidance.cta_sections: CTA sections at the bottom of marketing pages should stand out visually — subtle background gradient or glass effect, not just a plain card.

header.center_content: Nav links — flex with gap 1.5rem. Hidden below md, visible above.
header.right_content: CTA button + mobile hamburger. Hamburger ONLY below md breakpoint.
header.button_sizing: Buttons in the header use compact sizing: py-1.5 px-3 text-sm (~32px tall). The header is a tight 52px bar — default d-interactive padding is too large here.

body.note: Full-width sections stack vertically. Each section uses d-section with --d-section-py. Body has NO padding — sections own their spacing. Natural document scroll.

footer.note: Multi-column footer with link groups and legal.

code.example:
Shell({ config: 'top-nav-footer' },
  Shell.Header({}, headerContent),
  Shell.Nav({}, navItems),
  Shell.Body({}, mainContent),
  Shell.Footer({}, footerContent)
)
